DatabaseRef.FindByName: select ability_id, name from resources.abilities where name ilike '%{VALUE}%'
DatabaseRef.FindById: select name from resources.abilities where ability_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select dialog_id, string_agg(text, '; ') from resources.dialogs inner join resources.dialog_screens using (dialog_id) where text ilike '%{VALUE}%' group by dialog_id limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select string_agg(text, '; ') from resources.dialogs inner join resources.dialog_screens using (dialog_id) where dialog_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select dialog_set_map_id, topic_text || coalesce(' - ' || ( select string_agg(text, '; ') from resources.dialog_screens ds where ds.dialog_id = dsm.dialog_id), '') from resources.dialog_set_maps dsm where topic_text ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select topic_text || coalesce(' - ' || ( select string_agg(text, '; ') from resources.dialog_screens ds where ds.dialog_id = dsm.dialog_id), '') from resources.dialog_set_maps dsm where dialog_set_map_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select effect_id, effect_desc from resources.effects where effect_desc ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select effect_desc from resources.effects where effect_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select template_id, template_name from resources.entity_templates where template_name ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select template_name from resources.entity_templates where template_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select event_set_id, name from resources.event_sets where name ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select name from resources.event_sets where event_set_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select set_id, name from resources.point_sets where name ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select name from resources.point_sets where set_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select item_id, name from resources.items where name ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select name from resources.items where item_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select mission_id, history_text from resources.missions where history_text ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select history_text from resources.missions where mission_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select step_id, step_display_log_text from resources.mission_steps where step_display_log_text ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select step_display_log_text from resources.mission_steps where step_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select objective_id, display_log_text from resources.mission_objectives where display_log_text ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select display_log_text from resources.mission_objectives where objective_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select task_id, task_id from resources.mission_tasks where task_id::varchar ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select task_id from resources.mission_tasks where task_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select region_id, tag from resources.ring_transport_regions where tag ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select tag from resources.ring_transport_regions where region_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select sequence_id, kismet_script_name from resources.sequences where kismet_script_name ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select kismet_script_name from resources.sequences where sequence_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select stargate_id, name from resources.stargates where name ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select name from resources.stargates where stargate_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select moniker_id, text from resources.texts where text ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select text from resources.texts where moniker_id = {VALUE}

DatabaseRef.FindByName: select world_id, world from resources.worlds where world ilike '%{VALUE}%' limit 50
DatabaseRef.FindById: select world from resources.worlds where world_id = {VALUE}

Node.Name: Boolean Var
Node.Description: Logical (true/false) variable
Node.Port: VAR.W{Value} = VAR.R{Set} PROPAGATE{Value}

Node.Name: Integer Var
Node.Port: VAR.W{Value} = VAR.R{Set} PROPAGATE{Value}

Node.Name: Float Var
Node.Port: VAR.W{Value} = VAR.R{Set} PROPAGATE{Value}

Node.Name: String Var
Node.Port: VAR.W{Value} = VAR.R{Set} PROPAGATE{Value}

Node.Name: Vector3 Var
Node.Port: VAR.W{Value} = VAR.R{Set} PROPAGATE{Value}

Node.Name: Entity Var
Node.Port: VAR.W{Value} = VAR.R{Set} PROPAGATE{Value}

Node.Name: Mission Update
Node.Description: Fired when the status of a mission was updated (the mission was accepted, completed, abandoned or failed).
Node.TeardownScript: #if CONNECTED(Started) self.owner.unsubscribe(LOCAL{AcceptedId}) #endif #if CONNECTED(Completed) self.owner.unsubscribe(LOCAL{CompletedId}) #endif #if CONNECTED(Failed) self.owner.unsubscribe(LOCAL{FailedId}) #endif #if CONNECTED(Rewards Chosen) self.owner.unsubscribe(LOCAL{RewardsId}) #endif

Node.Name: Mission Step Update
Node.Description: Fired when the status of a step was updated (the step was accepted, completed, abandoned or failed).

Node.Name: Mission Objective Update
Node.Description: Fired when the status of an objective was updated (the objective was accepted, completed, abandoned or failed).

Node.Name: Mission Task Update
Node.Description: Fired when the status of a task was updated (the task was accepted, completed, abandoned, failed or the progress counter was updated).

Node.Name: Custom Event
Node.Description: Triggered when a user defined event is fired from Python code.

Node.Name: Designer
Node.Description: Called when a designer event is invoked manually with the .debugevent command.

Node.Name: Stargate
Node.TeardownScript:
#if CONNECTED(Make Gate) self.owner.unsubscribe(LOCAL{MakeGateSubscriptionId}) #endif
#if CONNECTED(Make Gate Failed) self.owner.unsubscribe(LOCAL{MakeGateFailedSubscriptionId}) #endif
#if CONNECTED(Destroy Gate) self.owner.unsubscribe(LOCAL{DestroyGateSubscriptionId}) #endif
#if CONNECTED(Gate Passage) self.owner.unsubscribe(LOCAL{GatePassageSubscriptionId}) #endif

Node.Name: Dialog Open
Node.Description: Triggered when a dialog is displayed to the player.

Node.Name: Interaction Set Triggered
Node.Description: Triggered when the player interacted with an entity via an interaction set map.

Node.Name: Dialog Button Choice
Node.Description: Triggered when the player selects one of the buttons in a dialog.

Node.Name: Interacted with Entity
Node.Description: Triggered when the player is trying the interact with an entity (right-clicking it ingame or via a script).

Node.Name: Entity Spawned
Node.Description: Triggered when a new entity is spawned.

Node.Name: Entity Dead
Node.Description: Triggered when an entity dies.

Node.Name: Client Hinted Generic Region
Node.Description: Triggered when the player enters or exits a user defined box region.

Node.Name: Script Loaded
Node.Description: Triggered when the script was initialized.

Node.Name: Player Loaded
Node.Description: Triggered when the player entered the level.

Node.Name: Item Interaction
Node.Description: Triggered when an item is picked up, equipped/unequipped, used in the inventory or in combat.
Node.InitScript:
def itemCb(params): VAR.W{Player} = params['player'] PROPAGATE{Player} VAR.W{Bag} = params['bagId'] PROPAGATE{Bag} VAR.W{Slot} = params.get('slotId') PROPAGATE{Slot} VAR.W{Quantity} = params['quantity'] PROPAGATE{Quantity} VAR.W{Target} = params.get('target') PROPAGATE{Target} TRIGGER{Out} return PROPERTY{Stop Propagating Event}
#if PROPERTY(Event) == "1" LOCAL{HandlerId} = self.owner.subscribe('item.pickup::' + str(PROPERTY{Design Id}), itemCb, once = PROPERTY{Fire Only Once}) #elseif PROPERTY(Event) == "2" LOCAL{HandlerId} = self.owner.subscribe('item.equip::' + str(PROPERTY{Design Id}), itemCb, once = PROPERTY{Fire Only Once}) #elseif PROPERTY(Event) == "3" LOCAL{HandlerId} = self.owner.subscribe('item.unequip::' + str(PROPERTY{Design Id}), itemCb, once = PROPERTY{Fire Only Once}) #elseif PROPERTY(Event) == "4" LOCAL{HandlerId} = self.owner.subscribe('item.durabilityloss::' + str(PROPERTY{Design Id}), itemCb, once = PROPERTY{Fire Only Once}) #elseif PROPERTY(Event) == "5" LOCAL{HandlerId} = self.owner.subscribe('item.use::' + str(PROPERTY{Design Id}), itemCb, once = PROPERTY{Fire Only Once}) #elseif PROPERTY(Event) == "6" LOCAL{HandlerId} = self.owner.subscribe('item.melee::' + str(PROPERTY{Design Id}), itemCb, once = PROPERTY{Fire Only Once}) #elseif PROPERTY(Event) == "7" LOCAL{HandlerId} = self.owner.subscribe('item.ranged::' + str(PROPERTY{Design Id}), itemCb, once = PROPERTY{Fire Only Once}) #endif

Node.Name: Inventory Monitor
Node.Description: Monitors the quantity of an item in the players inventory. When the quantity changes, the appropriate trigger output is called.

Node.Name: Teleport In
Node.Description: Triggered when the player finished teleporting to a different location via ring transport.

Node.Name: Teleport Out
Node.Description: Triggered when the player is teleporting to a different location via ring transport.

Node.Name: Compare Bool
Compare Int
Compare Float
Compare String
Compare Entity
Compare Vector
Counter Int
Node.RestoreScript: #if PROPERTY(Persistent) == "true" if 'NODEID{}' in self.savedVars: LOCAL{Value} = self.savedVars['NODEID{}'] #endif

Node.Name: Effect QR Damage
Effect QR Damage ({Stat Id})
Node.Port: result = self.effect.qrCombatDamage(VAR_OR_PROP{Stat Id}, VAR_OR_PROP{Damage Type}, VAR_OR_PROP{Base Damage}, VAR_OR_PROP{Ranged}, PROPERTY{Use Shared QR}) #if CONNECTED(Total Damage) VAR.W{Total Damage} = result['total'] PROPAGATE{Total Damage} #endif #if CONNECTED(Remaining Damage) VAR.W{Remaining Damage} = result['remaining'] PROPAGATE{Remaining Damage} #endif #if CONNECTED(Remaining Dmg Percent) VAR.W{Remaining Dmg Percent} = result['remaining'] * 100 / result['total'] PROPAGATE{Remaining Dmg Percent} #endif #if CONNECTED(Result Code) VAR.W{Result Code} = result['resultCode'] PROPAGATE{Result Code} #endif TRIGGER{Out}

Node.Name: Effect Change Stat
Effect Change Stat ({Stat Id})
Uniform Random
Random Roll
Trigger Player Event
Node.Port: self.owner.fire(VAR_OR_PROP{Event Name}, player = self.owner)

Node.Name: Trigger Space Event
Node.Port: self.owner.space.fire(VAR_OR_PROP{Event Name}, player = self.owner)

Node.Name: Check Moniker
Check Effect
Remove Moniker
Node.Port: VAR.R{Entity}.abilities.removeMoniker(zlib.crc32(VAR_OR_PROP{Moniker})) TRIGGER{Out}

Node.Name: Add Effect
Remove Effect
Node.Port: VAR.R{Entity}.abilities.removeEffect(DefMgr.get('effect', VAR_OR_PROP{Effect Id})) TRIGGER.P{Out}

Node.Name: Spawn Entity
Kill Entity
Despawn Entity
Move To
Get Entity
Update Entity Property
Update Interaction Type
Get Entity Location
Get Entity Property
Get Entity Stat
Set Entity Stat
Node.Port: if VAR.R{Entity}: stat = VAR.R{Entity}.getStat(VAR_OR_PROP{Stat Id}) #if CONNECTED(Min) stat.setMin(VAR.R{Min}) #endif #if CONNECTED(Current) stat.setCurrent(VAR.R{Current}) #endif #if CONNECTED(Max) stat.setMax(VAR.R{Max}) #endif VAR.R{Entity}.sendDirtyStats() TRIGGER{Successful} #if CONNECTED(Failed) else: TRIGGER.P{Failed} #endif

Node.Name: Get Distance
Get Facing
Attach Body Component
Detach Body Component
Generate Threat
Drop Loot
Get Combatant State
Set Combatant State
Node.Port: VAR.R{Entity}.setCombatantStateFlag(VAR_OR_PROP{State Flag}) TRIGGER{Out}
VAR.R{Entity}.unsetCombatantStateFlag(VAR_OR_PROP{State Flag}) TRIGGER{Out}

Node.Name: Lock Movement
Node.Port: VAR.R{Entity}.addMovementLock() TRIGGER{Out}
VAR.R{Entity}.removeMovementLock() TRIGGER{Out}

Node.Name: Teleport
Launch Ability
Update Mission
Node.Port: VAR.R{Player}.missions.accept(VAR_OR_PROP{Mission Id}) TRIGGER{Out}
VAR.R{Player}.missions.displayRewards(VAR_OR_PROP{Mission Id}) TRIGGER{Out}
VAR.R{Player}.missions.complete(VAR_OR_PROP{Mission Id}) TRIGGER{Out}
VAR.R{Player}.missions.fail(VAR_OR_PROP{Mission Id}) TRIGGER{Out}
VAR.R{Player}.missions.abandon(VAR_OR_PROP{Mission Id}) TRIGGER{Out}

Node.Name: Update Mission Objective
Node.Port: VAR.R{Player}.missions.completeObjective(VAR_OR_PROP{Mission Id}, VAR_OR_PROP{Objective Id}) TRIGGER{Out}
VAR.R{Player}.missions.failObjective(VAR_OR_PROP{Mission Id}, VAR_OR_PROP{Objective Id}) TRIGGER{Out}

Node.Name: Advance Mission
Node.Port: VAR.R{Player}.missions.advance(VAR_OR_PROP{Mission Id}, VAR_OR_PROP{Step Id}) TRIGGER{Out}

Node.Name: Get Mission Status
Get Mission Step Status
Get Mission Objective Status
Give Items to Player
Remove Items from Player
Find Item on Player
Get Active Slot
Get Current Ammo Stat
Set Active Slot
Update Stargate Address
Player Communication
System Communication
Initiate Dialog
Node.Port: VAR.R{Player}.displayDialog(VAR.R{NPC}, VAR_OR_PROP{Dialog Set}) TRIGGER{Out}

Node.Name: Add Interaction
Remove Interaction
Dynamic Update
Player-Only Property Update
Gate
Log
Node.Port: self.owner.debug(VAR_OR_PROP{Message}) #if CONNECTED(Integer) self.owner.debug(str(VAR.R{Integer})) #endif #if CONNECTED(Float) self.owner.debug(str(VAR.R{Float})) #endif #if CONNECTED(Boolean) self.owner.debug(str(VAR.R{Boolean})) #endif #if CONNECTED(Entity) name = VAR.R{Entity}.getName() if VAR.R{Entity} else 'None' entityId = str(VAR.R{Entity}.entityId) if VAR.R{Entity} else '0' self.owner.debug("Entity " + entityId + ' <' + name + '>') #endif TRIGGER{Out}

Node.Name: Timer
Play Sequence
Get Event Set Sequence
Play Minigame
Ring Transport Dialog
Add Integer
Subtract Integer
Multiply Integer
Divide Integer
